name: Hedgehog Kids' Mini Weighted Plush Throw Pillow White - Pillowfort™
description: Bring cute style to your little one's space with this Mini Stuffed Hedgehog Weighted Novelty Plush Pillow from Pillowfort™. This mini decorative pillow is designed in the shape of a hedgehog in an off-white hue with a faux fur upper and wearing glasses for a cute look. Boasting a polyester microplush exterior and polyester filling for plush comfort, the hedgehog weighted pillow is perfect for snuggling, decorating or gifting.
